questions.question: In an optical fibre, the core is made of a _________.
Which copper-based alloy is a preferred material for making standard resistors because of its high resistivity and low temperature coefficient?
How is the vast distance between galaxies measured?
The ampere magnitude is determined by setting the numerical value of the elementary charge equal to _______ .
Which of the following quantities has both magnitude and direction?
What does the closeness of magnetic field lines indicate about the magnetic field?
questions.option_3: Relative strength of the magnetic field

questions.question: According to Lenz’s Law, the direction of induced current is such that _________.
questions.option_1: it aids the change in magnetic flux
questions.option_2: it opposes the change in magnetic flux
questions.option_3: it strengthens the applied magnetic field
questions.option_4: it neutralises the magnetic field completely

questions.question: Which of the following statements about action and reaction forces is correct?
questions.option_1: Action and reaction forces act on the same body and cancel each other.
questions.option_2: The internal action and reaction forces between different parts of a body do not cancel out.
questions.option_3: Action is always greater than reaction in magnitude.
questions.option_4: Action and reaction forces are equal, opposite and act on different bodies.

questions.question: Who predicted the existence of a new particle, now known as the neutrino, in 1931, using the conservation laws of energy and momentum for β-decay?
What is the direction of frictional force?
questions.option_1: Along the normal to the contact surface
questions.option_2: Opposite to the direction of relative motion
questions.option_4: Same as the direction of applied force

questions.question: The critical angle for diamond is approximately _______.
The internal energy of gas is the ________.
questions.option_1: only potential energies of its molecules when the box is at rest
questions.option_2: sum of rotational, vibrational and potential energies of its molecules when the box is at rest
questions.option_3: sum of kinetic and potential energies of its molecules when the box is at rest
questions.option_4: sum of translational, rotational and vibrational energies of its molecules when the box is at rest

questions.question: Which value has three significant figures?
